description.value: Aura strong (no school); CL 17th; Weight 5 lbs. Price varies by specific type: Lesser focused metamagic rod 3,000 gp Focused metamagic rod 11,000 gp Greater focused metamagic rod 24,500 gp DESCRIPTION The wielder can cast up to three spells per day that are focused as though using the Focused Spell feat. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Rod, Focused Spell Cost varies by specific type: Lesser focused metamagic rod 1,500 gp Focused metamagic rod 5,500 gp Greater focused metamagic rod 12,250 gp
